doc_title_en: Notice regarding execution of subscription agreement for public tender offer for Shinko Shoji shares and termination of capital and business alliance

key_facts.reason_jp: 新光商事を完全子会社化する公開買付けに対し、保有株式の合理的な取り扱いとして応募

summary_en: Restar to tender 1,550,000 Shinko Shoji shares (5.12% of outstanding) to Kaga Electronics' public tender offer for complete subsidiary acquisition. Capital alliance with Shinko Shoji terminated effective today.
summary_jp: レスター、新光商事株155万株（発行済5.12%）を加賀電子の公開買付けに応募。新光商事との資本業務提携を本日解消。
tag_en: Tender offer participation – Restar to tender 1,550,000 Shinko Shoji shares (5.12% S/O) to Kaga Electronics; capital alliance termination
tag_jp: 公開買付け応募 – レスターが新光商事株155万株（発行済5.12%）を加賀電子への応募契約締結；資本業務提携解消

doc_title_en: Notification of Revision to Dividend Forecast for Fiscal Year Ending March 2026 (Dividend Increase)

key_facts.reason_jp: 中期経営計画の「DOE 4%以上」「安定的かつ継続的な増配」方針に基づき、過去最高の連結業績達成を受け実施

summary_en: Year-end dividend raised ¥3/share to ¥68 (full-year ¥128). DOE 4.0%. Mid-term plan targets DOE 4%+ and stable continuous dividend growth; record consolidated earnings triggered the hike.
summary_jp: 期末配当を3円増配し68円に修正（年間128円）。DOE 4.0%。中期計画のDOE 4%以上、安定的継続増配方針に基づき、過去最高の連結業績を受け実施。
tag_en: Dividend Hike - ¥128/share (¥3 increase to year-end) - DOE 4.0% - FY3/26
tag_jp: 増配 - 128円/株（期末3円増配） - DOE 4.0% - 2026年3月期
